publishedAbstract: - There is a warning message displayed against the operator-lifecycle-manager from the RHOCP UI saying as seen in the screenshot below: [image=[src="images/warning_message_ocpui.png", alt="warning_message_ocpui", size="LG- Large", data-cp-size="100%", data-cp-align="center", caption="Warning message seen from OCP UI",]]- co/operator-lifecycle-manager reports `IncompatibleOperatorsInstalled` in its status with the below message: ``` $ oc get co/operator-lifecycle-manager-o json | jq-r.status.conditions[]- lastTransitionTime: "2024-07-09T07:13:23Z" message: 'ClusterServiceVersions blocking cluster upgrade: openshift-storage/odf-operator.v4.12.14-rhodf is incompatible with OpenShift minor versions greater than 4.13' reason: IncompatibleOperatorsInstalled status: "False" type: Upgradeable ```
publishedTitle: ClusterServiceVersions blocking cluster upgrade: openshift-storage/odf-operator:v4.y is incompatible with OpenShift minor versions greater than 4.(y+1)
